name: Chocolate Ice Crispy Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch pie plate.
2. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, place the syrup and chocolate chips. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 45 seconds or until hot; stir until smooth.
3. Remove 1/4 cup of the chocolate mixture to a small bowl. Add cereal to the remaining chocolate mixture, stirring until well coated; cool slightly.
4. Using the back of a spoon, press the mixture evenly on the bottom and up the sides of the prepared pie plate to form the crust. Place in the freezer for 15-20 minutes or until the crust is firm.
5. Meanwhile, stir the sour cream into the reserved chocolate mixture. Spoon half of the ice cream into the crust; top with a portion of the chocolate sauce. Add scoops of ice cream and the remaining sauce. Cover; return to the freezer until serving time.
6 servings.
